# Technical notes on ReactOS FreeType 2.10.0

- FreeType in ReactOS is a static library. ftfd.dll (win32ss/drivers/font/ftfd) actually use FreeType.
- As usual in 3rd party library, the different parts are wrapped by #ifdef __REACTOS__ ... #endif.
- Stack size is limited, so we have to use malloc/free instead of large stack variables.
- malloc/free in ftfd.dll are fake, they are coming from win32ss/drivers/font/ftfd/rosglue.c.
- FT_Bitmap_Convert_ReactOS_Hack function is an extension of FT_Bitmap_Convert function.
  This hack function is (currently) needed for ReactOS text output.
- Now we can use FT_ENCODING_NONE for FT_Select_Charmap on FON/FNT files.
- Jamfile's in source are useless for ReactOS (search and delete).
- Makefile's in source are useless for ReactOS (search and delete).
